hero.label: UI-First Full-Stack Software Engineer

principles.title: UI Clarity

quote.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.

selectedWork.label: Selected Work
selectedWork.description: Most of my work is internal and lives inside enterprise environments. Below is a curated, non-confidential view of what I've owned and shipped across Promotion Advisor—focused on product experience, reliability, observability, data-heavy UI, and GenAI exploration.

productContext.publicContextDisclaimer: Work details here are intentionally sanitized; link is for public product context only.
productContext.publicSummary: Publicly described as a solution that helps companies design and implement promotional activities to maximize margin, sales, and long-term impact; supports better allocation of promotional investment and transparency into event performance, supported by data collection/cleaning/validation and insights.

AI capabilities for data grid validation and filtering
Prototyping recipe automation with Databricks Genie
technicalHighlights: AI-native features with dynamic UI tool calling
LLM-assisted data grid analysis and validation checks
UX patterns designed for user trust and feedback loops
Coordinating firm-wide AI developer tooling pilots

collaborationCta.prefix: Want to chat about frontend craft, reliability, or GenAI product UX?

hackathonSpotlight.label: Hackathon Spotlight
hackathonSpotlight.description: A full-stack tool built for maintenance contractors and operations teams to convert messy work orders + site photos into a structured cleansheet—then compare invoice totals vs. should-cost estimates to flag billing discrepancies.

project.title: Cleansheet Cost Estimation Tool
project.description: AI-powered cleansheet generator that turns job text + photos into structured task breakdowns, editable cost tables, and variance analytics for invoice review.
project.oneLiner: Built an AI-powered cost estimation tool projected to identify $30M+ in annual contractor billing discrepancies across enterprise maintenance portfolios (illustrative scenario).
project.overview: Designed to help teams quickly understand what work should cost, spot variance vs. invoices, and turn reactive auditing into repeatable cost intelligence.
keyFeatures: AI-powered data extraction: parses job descriptions + photos into itemized task breakdowns with time/cost estimates
Interactive cleansheet table: real-time editable rows, drag-and-drop reordering, automatic totals (labor + materials + overall)
Multi-source rate handling: supports invoice-derived rates or contractor default rates with conditional validation
Variance analytics dashboard: compares should-cost vs invoice totals with percentage variance indicators and alerts
Waterfall visualizations: hours/cost breakdown across prep, core tasks, and non-labor items (materials/equipment/permits)
Contractor management: CRUD for contractor profiles and default hourly rates

impactPotential.disclaimer: Impact numbers below are illustrative scenario math (not measured production outcomes). Actual results depend on adoption, data quality, invoice mix, and audit processes.
valueProposition: Reduces invoice audit time from hours to minutes, enabling review of more invoices with the same resources (target outcome)
Helps identify overcharges/inefficiencies via structured breakdown + variance signals (target outcome)

audienceCopy.technicalRecruiter: Built a full-stack multimodal AI app (React/TS + FastAPI) that extracts structured tasks from text + photos, powers an editable cleansheet UI, and computes variance analytics and visualizations.
audienceCopy.businessStakeholder: A cost-intelligence tool that turns unstructured work orders into standardized cleansheets and flags invoice vs should-cost variance—helping scale audit coverage and strengthen contractor negotiations.

metrics.label: Internships
metrics.description: Angular, Streamlit, and full-stack web apps

metrics.label: Ownership
metrics.description: From architecture to deployment and operations

timeline.impact: Acted as UI Subject Matter Expert (SME) for Promotion Advisor 2.0; own full-stack development, delivering full-page overhauls, Scenarios compare views, and collapsible sidebars; engineered real-time search APIs and websocket-based broadcasting; implemented AutoGen-driven AI features with human-in-the-loop controls; mentored interns on Databricks Genie SQL recipe automation.

Led frontend development for Dynamic Promo Group query filters; engineered visual margin recommendations engines; built and automated CI/CD GitLab pipelines for multi-client deployment; integrated OpenTelemetry and migrated Dynatrace dashboards; implemented cloud storage data contracts via dynamic Protobuf generation.

Optimized complex data tables using virtualization (10k+ entries) and built core copy-paste modules; served as L3 Support Lead for production issue resolution; migrated legacy SQL promotion tactics to Node.js configurations; integrated Power BI and AG Grid reporting interfaces; spearheaded firm-wide adoption of GitHub Copilot.

Built a web application to extract and preview ZIP contents directly in the browser; developed a dynamic UI to view and edit CSV and JSON files with rollback, version control, and diff viewing capabilities.
Built reusable UI components, layouts, and pages in Angular, successfully translating conceptual designs into production UI with clean styling in SCSS.
Engineered a cutting-edge frontend platform utilizing the Streamlit Framework to facilitate sophisticated and efficient internal API testing.
